schema-columns.guard: grep -q 'depends_on' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/db/schema.ts && grep -q 'resume_token' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/db/schema.ts && grep -q '"waiting"' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/db/schema.ts && grep -q '"awaiting_input"' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/db/schema.ts && python3 -c "import os; sqls=[f for f in os.listdir('packages/ai/agent-mcp/drizzle') if f.endswith('.sql')]; assert len(sqls)>=4, f'expected >=4 migrations, got {len(sqls)}'"
schema-columns.notes: ONE migration (0004_*) covers all four new columns: depends_on, on_upstream_failure, inputs, resume_token. ONE status enum extension covers both 'waiting' and 'awaiting_input'. Never split into two migrations — the downstream plans assume both statuses exist before they start.

task-types.guard: grep -q '"waiting"' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/validation/task.ts && grep -q '"awaiting_input"' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/validation/task.ts && grep -q 'resumeToken' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/validation/task.ts && grep -q 'dependsOn' packages/ai/agent-mcp/src/validation/task.ts && npx --yes nx build agent-mcp 2>&1 | grep -q 'Successfully ran'
task-types.notes: PREREQUISITE ORDER: update agent-mcp-types FIRST. validation/task.ts re-exports TaskStatus from @adhd/agent-mcp-types; any assignment of 'waiting' or 'awaiting_input' to TaskStatus produces a TS error until the types package is updated and rebuilt.

audit-foundation.notes: Verifies schema-columns.1-5 and task-types.1-6. All checks must pass before code-review.

code-review.notes: Human hold point. Reviewer inspects migration, schema, types diff. Creates sentinel when satisfied.

audit-final.notes: Full DoD coverage: schema columns, status enum, store methods, types export, build, publish.

docs-and-publish.notes: Bump agent-mcp to 0.1.5. Bump agent-mcp-types (TaskStatus gains 'waiting' + 'awaiting_input'). Note in ROADMAP that this foundation enables 0.2.0 and 0.3.0 to run in parallel.
